rationale: Most dimensions captured with reasonable depth. Industry, geography, regulatory baseline, recurring matters, risk appetite, and open notes all align with the seed. Key gap: reports_to is recorded as null when the seed clearly shows 'Managing Director' — this is a missed detail. The stakeholder capture otherwise matches including key partners and escalation thresholds. Overall, the intake reflects the persona accurately with one substantive omission.
specific_gaps: reports_to field captured as null instead of 'Managing Director'
